files.content:
---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"nav">

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<nav data-slot="toc" class={cn("flex flex-col gap-3", className)} {...props}>
  <slot />
</nav>

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"p"> &
  HTMLAttributes<"h2"> &
  HTMLAttributes<"div"> & {
    as?: "p" | "h2" | "div"
  }

const { as: Tag = "p", class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<Tag
  data-slot="toc-title"
  class={cn("text-sm font-medium tracking-tight", className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</Tag>
--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"ul"> const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---
--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"li"> const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

export { default as Toc } from "./toc.astro"
export { default as TocMenu } from "./toc-menu.astro"
export { default as TocMenuItem } from "./toc-menu-item.astro"
export { default as TocMenuLink } from "./toc-menu-link.astro"
export { default as TocTitle } from "./toc-title.astro"
